{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56163","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56163/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56163/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56163/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56163","id":2586313293,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6aKAJN","number":56163,"title":"Unsuccessful assignment without any error","user":{"login":"ArmanZarrin97","id":120459964,"node_id":"U_kgDOBy4SvA","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/120459964?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97","html_url":"https://github.com/ArmanZarrin97","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ArmanZarrin97/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-14T14:58:34Z","updated_at":"2024-10-14T14:58:34Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi,

I tried to run this line in one of my functions:

 J[:, isl]=[ki... zeros(length(setdiff(1:nBus,ipq)))...]

J is a sparse matrix with size 120*120. J[:, isl] is a column with only four values, which are [11.00 -11.00 44.00 -44.00]. [ki... zeros(length(setdiff(1:nBus,ipq)))...] is a matrix 120*1, of which 23 elements are 50.00 and the others equal to zero. The result of running this code is again a column with only four values, which are [0.00 0.00 0.00 0.00]. However, I expect it to be a column with 23, 24,..., or 27 values, which includes 23 values equal to 50.00. 

I didn't encounter any error. I believe it should be a bug. By chance I understood that this assignment doesn't work correctly, But it could be in fact dangerous for the others. 

I fixed it in this way:

J[:, isl]=[ki... zeros(length(setdiff(1:nBus,ipq)))...]**[:,1]**

Best,
Arman
